markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-240 — Low-speed electric vehicle equipment requirements

A low-speed electric vehicle shall conform with applicable federal manufacturing equipment standards. Any person who operates a low-speed electric vehicle in violation of this section commits a class B traffic infraction.
